name: Pet Waste Bag + Dispenser 40packs
shortDescription: Dog Poop Bag Holder with Leash Clip . Comes with 40 disposable waste bags, each bag is perforate for easy separation. Make your pet care routine more efficient and enjoyable with the PET Waste Bag + Dispenser 40 Packs.
description: PET Waste Bag + Dispenser - 40 Packs Keep your surroundings clean and your pet happy with our PET Waste Bag + Dispenser Combo! Designed for convenience and reliability, this all-in-one solution makes dog walks and clean-ups a breeze. Features: 40 High-Quality Waste Bags: Each pack contains 40 durable, leak-proof waste bags that are designed to handle even the largest messes. Made from eco-friendly materials, these bags are strong, tear-resistant, and perfect for responsible pet owners. Easy-to-Use Dispenser: The included dispenser is compact and easily attaches to your leash or belt for quick access. It features a simple, one-handed operation for fast bag retrieval, ensuring you're always prepared. Convenient Design: Fitting comfortably in your hand or pocket. It includes a built-in clip for hassle-free attachment to your leash or bag. Make your pet care routine more efficient and enjoyable with the PET Waste Bag + Dispenser 40 Packs. Whether you’re heading out for a walk or managing your pet’s waste at home, this practical combo ensures you're always prepared for a clean and pleasant experience.
